name: social-media-chat-app
description: Make sure you have the following installed on your system: - [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/) (Latest LTS version recommended) - [MongoDB Atlas](https://www.mongodb.com/atlas/database) account and connection string - [Nodemon](https://www.npmjs.com/package/nodemon) (For backend development, install globally if needed: `npm install -g nodemon`)
